description: Composition, node editing, and capability picker requirements for registered Agent, code, workflow, adapter, guard, state, and human action refs.

userStories.title: Implement Agent node profile picker
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need Agent nodes to select existing profiles so that agent execution uses known tools, skills, and context.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent node editor selects only non-archived private, custom, or global Agent Designer profiles
Agent node editor supports prompt template editing where allowed by the workflow IR
Archived profiles cannot be selected and produce diagnostics if already referenced
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement code handler node picker
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need code nodes to reference registered handlers so that non-agent work is reusable and inspectable.
acceptanceCriteria: Code node editor selects registered handler refs only
Handler picker displays id, displayName, description, inputSchema, and outputSchema fields; schema fields may be null when registry metadata is absent
Missing handler refs produce diagnostics and block publish/run when executable behavior depends on them
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement nested workflow node picker and navigation
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need workflow nodes to reference existing workflow versions so that parent graphs stay readable.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow node editor selects a workflow id/version from registry metadata
Workflow node provides Open workflow navigation to a separate workflow builder/viewer
Parent graph does not inline-expand nested workflow internals in V2
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement adapter nodes and compatible edge adapter dialog
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need adapter choices for incompatible ports so that transformations are explicit and registered.
acceptanceCriteria: Adapter node editor selects registered adapters only
Incompatible edge diagnostics offer a dialog showing from/to schemas and compatible adapters
Adapter dialog supports Use as edge adapter and Insert adapter node actions
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement guard selection and params editing
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need guard refs and params to be controlled by registry metadata so that routing remains inspectable.
acceptanceCriteria: Edge guard editor selects registered guards only
Guard and adapter params editors appear only when registry metadata includes paramsSchema
Invalid guard or adapter params produce diagnostics with path/node/edge location when applicable
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented registry-controlled guard/adapter paramsSchema metadata, conditional params editors, and validation diagnostics for invalid or unsupported params.

userStories.title: Implement human node action configuration
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need human nodes to use registered human actions so that waits and resumes use the V1 wait-token model.
acceptanceCriteria: Human node editor supports prompt, raw JSON resume schema, registered action choices, and timeout
Human action picker uses registry metadata for action kind, label, and payload requirements
Missing or invalid human action refs show diagnostics and block publish/run when they affect executable behavior
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement simple state mapping controls
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need simple state read/write mapping controls so that common state access does not require raw IR editing.
acceptanceCriteria: State mapping UI supports simple global/local/edge reads and writes through dropdowns
Complex state mapping DSLs remain editable only through raw Workflow IR
Schema or state changes can invalidate connected graphs without blocking draft save
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented Workflow Builder simple state mapping controls for node and edge state reads/writes, plus workflow global state field declarations that feed mapping dropdowns.

userStories.title: Add composition boundary tests
userStories.description: As a security reviewer, I need tests proving composition only references registered capabilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Positive tests cover each node kind, profile selection, handler/adapter/guard selection, nested workflow selection, and adapter insertion
Negative tests cover archived profile selection, missing refs, incompatible edge without adapter, invalid params, and inline code attempts
State mapping tests cover simple visual mapping and raw-IR-only complex mapping
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added focused V2 composition boundary coverage tests that map registered node/picker paths, negative security diagnostics, adapter insertion, and state mapping raw-IR boundaries.
